overview: Timeless Health provides precision medicine and functional medicine in Miami, led by Dr. Elliot Dinetz, who personally oversees every patient using advanced biomarker analysis and root-cause diagnostics. The clinic specializes in longevity optimization, hormone balance, and reversal of chronic health conditions.
highlights: Physician-directed care with no associates or hand-offs
FDA-registered pharmaceutical-grade peptides and EBOO therapy
targetAudience: Individuals seeking to identify and address root causes of chronic health issues through personalized, precision longevity medicine.
